query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN fotoAntesUrl IS NOT NULL AND fotoAntesUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_foto_antes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN fotoDespuesUrl IS NOT NULL AND fotoDespuesUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_foto_despues,
  SUM(CASE WHEN fotoAntesMarcadaUrl IS NOT NULL AND fotoAntesMarcadaUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_foto_marcada
FROM items;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3B47TRBhQthMPN1.da4a966d722d --database LjHhpq7m8HsaWSJ2BF6kdt --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN fotoAntesUrl IS NOT NULL AND fotoAntesUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_foto_antes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN fotoDespuesUrl IS NOT NULL AND fotoDespuesUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_foto_despues,
  SUM(CASE WHEN fotoAntesMarcadaUrl IS NOT NULL AND fotoAntesMarcadaUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_foto_marcada
FROM items;
